entity.summary: Global centralized cryptocurrency exchange established in 2021 under the BitVenus identity and rebranded as BVOX in July 2024, continuing to offer spot and derivatives trading services.
entity.notes: Official BVOX support material verifies the July 19, 2024 BitVenus-to-BVOX rebrand and current domain. Public company profiles conflict on whether the platform lineage began in 2018 or 2021, so HEI retains the stored 2021 launch marker and medium confidence pending stronger primary evidence.

expected.summary: Centralized exchange launched in 2021 and still operating under the BVOX brand.

changes.summary: Global centralized cryptocurrency exchange established in 2021 under the BitVenus identity and rebranded as BVOX in July 2024, continuing to offer spot and derivatives trading services.
changes.notes: Official BVOX support material verifies the July 19, 2024 BitVenus-to-BVOX rebrand and current domain. Public company profiles conflict on whether the platform lineage began in 2018 or 2021, so HEI retains the stored 2021 launch marker and medium confidence pending stronger primary evidence.

events.title: The BitVenus platform lineage was established
events.description: The cryptocurrency trading platform later rebranded as BVOX was established under the BitVenus identity by 2021.
events.notes: Public profiles disagree between 2018 and 2021. HEI preserves the existing 2021 marker until a stronger primary launch source is available.

events.title: BitVenus rebranded as BVOX
events.description: BitVenus announced that its brand name would change to BVOX, with bvox.com becoming the new official domain while the platform continued operating.
events.notes: The change was presented as a brand upgrade rather than a shutdown, migration, or change of customer balances.

evidence.title: BVOX company profile
evidence.notes: The company-maintained profile states that BVOX was founded in 2021 and describes its global trading operations.

evidence.title: BVOX exchange profile
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile confirms the BitVenus-to-BVOX identity but presents an earlier establishment year, supporting the retained uncertainty.

evidence.title: BitVenus officially changes its name to BVOX
evidence.notes: Official announcement records the brand change, introduction of bvox.com, and continued availability of the former domain during the transition.

evidence.title: CoinGecko records the BitVenus-to-BVOX rebrand
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile explicitly states that BitVenus was rebranded as BVOX.

evidence.title: BVOX official exchange
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies the current BVOX identity and active trading interface.
